personal.name: Awais Nasir
personal.description: Software Engineer & Full Stack Architect with a focus on building secure, scalable, resilient, high-performing and cost-effective software solutions.

about.heading: Who I Am
about.subtitle: Building systems that scale — reliably, securely, and built to last.
principles: I architect for the long term, not just the deadline
I take ownership of the full lifecycle, not just my slice of it
I bridge the gap between technical depth and business outcomes
I mentor teams and raise engineering standards, not just ship features

highlights: Led the architecture and delivery of a centralized Memberships Platform for QC+ and Qatar Museums, migrating 100K+ members from legacy systems and fully digitizing corporate, individual, and event-based memberships.
Unified RBAC-driven admin workflows, membership approvals, ticketing, and QNB payment integrations — now the core system for cultural event access and monetization across all museums.
Led end-to-end system design discussions, collaborating with infrastructure, security, and operations teams.
Delivered end-to-end technical functionalities across planning, architecture, and deployment for Daleel Aqar, a large-scale real estate platform enabling property buying, selling, and rentals.
Architected app fully compliant with WCAG guidelines to achieve the official LevelAccess certification.
Structured within an Nx.dev monorepo to ensure scalability, maintainability, and rapid team onboarding.
Established AWS-based DevOps practices including Dockerized services, Bitbucket Pipelines, monitoring, IAM roles management, and secure infrastructure.
Designed and delivered the architecture for a platform connecting Instagram and TikTok influencers with brands, enabling seamless pitching, negotiations, and deal finalization.
Implemented a React-based frontend integrated with a Directus headless CMS (Node.js) for dynamic content management and flexible editorial workflows.
Architected AWS-based microservices for authentication, content delivery, and notifications.
Established integrations between Directus CMS and AWS microservices via GraphQL/REST APIs.
Mentored the development team on engineering best practices, modular design, and cloud deployment strategies — leading the project from initial architecture through to full deployment on AWS.

experience.periodDetail: SE2: Dec 2020 – Oct 2022 | Sr SE: Nov 2022 – Dec 2024
highlights: Performance Reporting (Jun 2023 – Dec 2024): Engineered a reporting platform with AI-powered chatbot using OpenAI APIs + LangChain + pgvector for semantic search; deployed to portal.afiniti.com.
WFM Historical Connectors (Apr 2023 – Oct 2024): Architected an ETL application to export, transpose, and load historical data from Afiniti databases into client environments.
WFM SaaS (Dec 2021 – Nov 2023): Built scalable tenant-based microservices with Keycloak RBAC, timezone handling, agent scheduling, forecasting, and live/historical reporting.
Db Utility (Apr 2021 – Nov 2022): Built internal utility for smooth deployment of database schemas, stored procedures, views, and triggers on production and staging servers.
Visenya (Nov 2023 – Dec 2024): Designed and delivered an internal platform automating data pipeline creation and management for AI and data integration teams.

experience.periodDetail: SE: Sep 2018 – Sep 2019 | Team Lead: Sep 2019 – Nov 2020
highlights: Planned, executed, and delivered diverse products/projects within time and budgetary constraints using AngularJS, Angular 2+, Ionic, Node.js, NestJS, ExpressJS, Sequelize, and GraphQL.
Omni Central: Contributed to an all-in-one communication platform with SMS, WhatsApp, email, and live chat, plus CRM, inbox management, and directories.
Aduro: Developed a hybrid Ionic app for remote hardware controller management (DHW systems, hoppers, boilers); upgraded from Ionic 1 to Ionic 4.
Led sprint planning with Trello, Jira, and ClickUp; deployed iOS apps to App Store and TestFlight.
Part of the Full Stack Developer team enhancing and integrating new features on the NetSuite platform.
Led design and enhancement of front-end applications connected to NetSuite backend using AngularJS, Angular 2+, and jQuery.
Integrated NetSuite with various technologies, streamlining data flow across multiple systems.
Full stack development on various PHP products using PHP Laravel and core PHP on the LAMP stack.

projects.title: Agentic Job Ingestion Tool
projects.description: Built a robust AI operator to solve the 'fragmented job market' problem in the Global South. Implemented intelligent data schemas to align scraped LLM outputs with structured business requirements, resolving complex schema mismatches. Developed automated scheduling for hands-off operation.
highlights: Automated job scraping and ingestion using LangChain agents
Schema alignment between LLM outputs and structured business data
Fully automated scheduling for zero-touch operation

projects.title: QC+ Memberships Platform
projects.description: Centralized Memberships Platform for QC+ and Qatar Museums, migrating 100K+ members from legacy systems. Fully digitized corporate, individual, and event-based memberships with QNB payment integrations.
highlights: 100K+ member migration from legacy systems
RBAC-driven admin workflows and membership approvals
Integrated QNB payment gateway
Core system for Qatar Museums cultural event monetization

projects.title: Afiniti Performance Reporting + AI Chatbot
projects.description: Reporting platform providing senior management with real-time insights into product performance across global client environments. Features an AI-powered chatbot enabling stakeholders to query performance data conversationally and receive dynamic, contextual responses.
highlights: AI-powered chatbot enabling conversational querying of performance data
Semantic search and contextual response generation over large datasets
Deployed to portal.afiniti.com serving global stakeholders
Real-time dashboard with interactive reports, graphs, and analytics

projects.title: Visenya — AI Data Pipeline Platform
projects.description: Internal platform that automated data pipeline creation and management for AI and data integration teams. Built an abstraction layer on top of an industry-standard workflow orchestration engine, eliminating manual infrastructure overhead and enabling teams to focus on their actual work.
highlights: Abstraction layer over a workflow orchestration engine — no deep infra knowledge required
Daily collaboration with AI researchers and data engineers to translate needs into features
Compressed pipeline setup time significantly — became core productivity tool for data and AI teams

projects.title: Daleel Aqar — Real Estate Platform
projects.description: Large-scale real estate platform enabling property buying, selling, and rentals. Delivered end-to-end technical functionalities across planning, architecture, and deployment. WCAG-compliant and certified by LevelAccess.
highlights: WCAG certified by LevelAccess
Nx.dev monorepo architecture for scalability and rapid onboarding
AWS DevOps: Docker, Bitbucket Pipelines, IAM, monitoring
Full property lifecycle: listings, search, and transactions

projects.title: WFM SaaS — Workforce Management
projects.description: Scalable, tenant-based SaaS for contact center workforce management. Supports agent scheduling, time-off requests, forecasting, and real-time reporting with role-based access control and multi-timezone support.
highlights: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with role-based access control
Timezone-aware agent scheduling for global contact centers
Statistical forecasting for agent workforce planning
Live and historical reports for strategic insights

projects.title: Omni Central — Omnichannel Communication
projects.description: All-in-one platform for multi-channel customer communication including SMS, WhatsApp, email, and live chat. Incorporates CRM, inbox management, directories, and spreadsheet features.
highlights: Multi-channel: SMS, WhatsApp, Email, Live Chat
CRM and inbox management modules
Frontend and backend inbox module ownership

projects.title: Aduro — IoT Hardware Controller App
projects.description: Hybrid mobile app using Ionic to interface with hardware controllers, enabling remote management of DHW systems, hoppers, and boilers. Upgraded from Ionic 1 to Ionic 4 for improved performance and user experience.
highlights: Remote management of DHW systems, hoppers, and boilers
Upgraded from Ionic 1 to Ionic 4
Published on iOS App Store and Google Play

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.pitch: I'm currently open to new opportunities in the Gulf region and globally. Whether it's a full-time role, consulting engagement, or technical advisory — reach out and let's explore what we can build together.
